seoTitle: GMP Audit Survival Kit — included with BioWikiPro Pro
seoDesc: A 6-in-1 toolkit to help QC/QA Pharma teams pass GMP & Annex 1 audits: checklist, tough Q&A, CAPA templates, mock interview. Included in Pro alongside the full academy.

hero.subtitle: A complete toolkit for Senior QC/QA: SOP gap analysis, CAPA templates, audit interview scripts — included with Pro, ready to use from day 1.

items.title: Audit in 2 weeks and no idea where to start?
items.desc: No concrete checklist, everyone interprets things differently, and the lead QC is stressed out.

items.title: SOP gaps but unsure which are critical?
items.desc: No tool to gauge compliance level — you keep guessing what to prioritize.

items.title: Auditor asks hard questions, team frozen?
items.desc: You have the knowledge but can't phrase it in proper GMP language — easy to get a finding.

includes.heading: What's in the Kit?
includes.subtitle: 6 resources — all included in your Pro subscription, alongside the full academy

items.title: GMP Audit Survival Guide
items.desc: The full framework — from 30 days out to audit day to the written response, step by step.

items.title: SOP Gap Analysis (Excel/Sheets)
items.desc: Score 20 quality-system elements; the sheet computes your % readiness and surfaces your worst gaps.

items.title: 10 CAPA Report Templates
items.desc: Ready-to-fill CAPA structures for the most common GMP audit nonconformances.

items.title: Audit Interview Q&A Scripts
items.desc: 50+ questions auditors ask most — with model answers for QC/QA.

items.title: Mock Audit Walkthrough
items.desc: A full inspection narrated from the auditor's perspective, so nothing on the day surprises you.

items.title: Bonus: 30-min Consulting Call
items.desc: 1-on-1 with Henry (QC/Pharma Sales Expert) — review your audit plan directly.

items.title: Save days of prep
items.text: The CAPA templates and gap-analysis sheet replace the blank-page scramble — fill them in and you instantly see where to focus before an audit.

items.title: Walk in calm
items.text: The interview Q&A scripts and auditor's-perspective walkthrough mean the questions on the day are ones you've already rehearsed.

items.title: Built on real audit logic
items.text: Every template maps to the nonconformances inspectors actually raise — not generic checklists, but the patterns that drive 483s and findings.

pricing.priceNote: Pro unlocks this kit + every toolkit and the full academy • Cancel anytime
pricing.standards: 📦 GMP WHO • Annex 1 EU • FSSC 22000 • ISO 15189

whoFor.heading: Who is this for?
items: Senior QC/QA Engineers with 3–7 years in Pharma or F&B
QC Supervisors preparing for their first GMP audit as lead
QA Managers who need ready-to-use resources to train the team before an audit
Anyone at a plant with an audit deadline in the next 1–3 months
whoFor.notFor: You're a QC with under 1 year of experience, or your plant has no basic QMS in place.

items.q: Which GMP standards does it fit?
items.a: The Kit is designed for GMP WHO, Annex 1 EU GMP, FSSC 22000, and ISO 15189. Suitable for Pharma and F&B plants preparing for audits from regulators or international customers.

items.q: How do I get the files?
items.a: The kit is part of BioWikiPro Pro. Once you subscribe, every file is available instantly from your dashboard downloads — no separate purchase, and you keep access for as long as your Pro subscription is active.

items.q: I'm a new QC — can I use it?
items.a: The Kit is designed for Senior QC/QA (3+ years). New QCs can still learn from the Interview Scripts and PDF Guide. The SOP Gap Analysis needs basic QMS knowledge to use effectively.
Yes. The FSSC 22000 section of the PDF Guide and the CAPA templates apply directly to F&B plants. The SOP Gap Analysis can be adapted for ISO 22000.

finalCta.note: Still have questions? Reach out directly.
